title: corymbis disticha
intro:
Corymbis disticha, also known as Corymbis disticha, is a flowering plant species in the family Fabaceae. The plant is commonly known as the "twice-pinnate pea". 

Corymbis disticha is known to have medicinal properties due to its high concentration of flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides. The plant's health benefits include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various ailments such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions.

Traditional herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and ointments made from the plant's leaves and flowers, which are used to treat a range of health issues.

Some of the health benefits associated with Corymbis disticha include reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and relief from pain and discomfort.
